name: 北大法宝·法律智能检索
description: PKULaw — Semantic (natural language) + keyword (exact / fuzzy) dual-mode retrieval over Chinese laws and judicial cases, every result links back to pkulaw.com for traceable, verifiable citations.
description_zh: 语义（自然语言描述） + 关键词（精确/模糊查询）双模式检索法规与案例，结果均带 pkulaw.com 原文链接，可追溯、可复核、可直接引用。
description_en: Semantic (natural-language) + keyword (exact / fuzzy) dual-mode retrieval over Chinese laws, regulations and judicial cases. Every result links back to pkulaw.com — traceable, verifiable, ready to cite.
examples_zh: 微信聊天记录作为民事诉讼电子证据，法院的认定标准和审查重点是什么？
员工连续旷工三天，公司能否解除劳动合同？请检索相关法律依据。
房屋租赁合同到期后房东拒绝退还押金，有没有类似司法案例？
查一下当前现行有效的「数据出境安全评估」中央层级法规。
公司收集员工人脸信息用于考勤，涉及哪些法律风险？给出依据和类案。
examples_en: What are the courts' standards and review focus for accepting WeChat chat records as electronic evidence in civil litigation?
Can a company terminate an employment contract after three consecutive days of absence? Find the legal basis.
Are there similar judicial cases where a landlord refused to refund a rental deposit after the lease ended?
List currently-in-force central-level Chinese regulations on cross-border data transfer security assessment.
What are the legal risks of collecting employee facial recognition data for attendance? Cite laws and cases.
